metadata.method_name: Phase 2 GBM-Based Aggregation Sensitivity and JRN Estimation
metadata.description: GBM probe-based estimation of Join Reproduction Number (JRN) and aggregation sensitivity analysis across 5 statistical aggregation strategies on the RelBench rel-f1 (Formula 1) relational database.
metadata.conclusion: Phase 2 analysis on 65 join-task pairs does NOT confirm inverted-U shape. Quadratic beta2=0.0459 (p=0.0001), monotonic rho=-0.019. The JRN-sensitivity relationship appears flat/weak. Probe-GT correlation: rho=0.440.
